doc_title_en: Notification of Share Acquisition Status (Self-Repurchase under Company Law Article 459, Section 1 and Articles of Incorporation Article 8)

key_facts.reason_jp: 会社法第459条第1項及び定款第8条に基づく自己株式取得

name_jp: スペースシャワーＳＫＩＹＡＫＩホールディングス
summary_en: 29,600 shares acquired April 2026 at ¥22.3M via open-market purchase on TSE. Cumulative: 117,400 shares (0.71% S/O), ¥91.4M consumed of ¥200M authorized limit. Execution window: Dec 2025–Nov 2026.
tag_en: Buyback Progress - 29,600 shares (0.18% S/O) acquired in April 2026 - ¥22.3M - 117,400 cumulative (58.7% of ¥200M limit)

doc_title_en: Notice of Dividend Forecast Revision (Dividend Hike) for Fiscal Year Ended March 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 2026年３月期は予想を上回る業績を達成

name_jp: スペースシャワーＳＫＩＹＡＫＩホールディングス
summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend raised from ¥24.00 to ¥25.00 per share. Modification driven by results exceeding forecast; subject to shareholder approval at the 32nd ordinary general meeting (scheduled 2026-06-25).
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を1株当たり24.00円から25.00円に引き上げ。業績が予想を上回ったことに伴う修正。第32回定時株主総会承認条件（予定日2026年6月25日）。
tag_en: Dividend hike – FY3/26 final: ¥24.00 → ¥25.00 per share
